error.signature: Cosine similarity returns nonsense results or vector DB rejects insert due to dimension mismatch

verdict.summary: Different embedding models produce different dimension vectors (OpenAI ada-002=1536, text-embedding-3-small=1536, text-embedding-3-large=3072). Mixing models in the same vector DB index corrupts similarity search silently with no error.

dead_ends.action: Switch embedding model and keep using the existing vector index
dead_ends.why_fails: New model produces different-dimension or differently-distributed vectors. Similarity scores become meaningless. Some DBs accept any dimension silently.

dead_ends.action: Truncate or pad vectors to match dimensions
dead_ends.why_fails: Truncating loses semantic information. Padding with zeros distorts distance calculations. Neither preserves similarity semantics.

workarounds.action: Re-embed all documents when changing embedding models
workarounds.how: Switching models requires full re-indexing. Store original text alongside embeddings for re-embedding.

workarounds.action: Use model name as part of the vector index name for isolation
workarounds.how: index_name = f'docs_{model_name}_{dimension}'  # separate index per model

workarounds.action: Use OpenAI's dimensions parameter to control output size if supported
